defaults.description: Documentation work identity — authoring and reshaping technical documentation
Foundational agent behavior rules (user interaction, tool usage, research, dependency management)
AsciiDoc formatting, validation, link verification, and template creation
Content quality, tone analysis, and organization standards for technical docs
Narrative styles for technical documentation — tone, voice, structural arc
SVG technical diagram authoring standards — uniform visual language, theming
Architectural Decision Record CRUD, numbering, and AsciiDoc formatting

skills_by_profile_reasoning: documentation domain — persona-documenter is the doc-authoring work identity, plus the doc skills its composition resolves (ref-asciidoc, ref-documentation, ref-narrative-styles, ref-svg-diagrams, manage-adr, manage-interface) and the foundational agent rules. Operator-curated per plan-15
